description: List component templates. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/report/component_templates. Required parameters: company_id.

component_templates.name: Published jobs
component_templates.library_content: Number of published and internal jobs.

component_templates.name: Filled jobs
component_templates.library_content: Number of jobs with all openings filled.

component_templates.name: Closed jobs
component_templates.library_content: Number of closed jobs.

component_templates.name: Job overview by status
component_templates.library_content: See all your current jobs grouped by their status.

component_templates.name: Active jobs per department
component_templates.library_content: Number of jobs with internal or published status in each department.

component_templates.name: Job activity over time
component_templates.library_content: See how many job drafts were created and how many published jobs have been changed.

component_templates.name: Fill rate
component_templates.library_content: Ratio of filled to all openings.

component_templates.name: Fill rate by department
component_templates.library_content: Percentage of filled openings in each department.

component_templates.name: Average job open time
component_templates.library_content: Average duration a job is open for internal and external applications.

component_templates.name: Open time per job
component_templates.library_content: Overview showing exactly how long each job is open for internal and external applications.

component_templates.name: Time to publish
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes to publish a job.

component_templates.name: Time to fill a job
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes for the company to fill a job opening.

component_templates.name: Time to fill a job by recruiter
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes a recruiter to fill a job opening.

component_templates.name: Time to close
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes to close a job.

component_templates.name: New candidates
component_templates.library_content: Number of new candidates.

component_templates.name: Candidate overview
component_templates.library_content: See the number of qualified and disqualified candidates.

component_templates.name: Pipeline breakdown
component_templates.library_content: Get a detailed breakdown of candidates per each pipeline stage.

component_templates.name: Candidate origins
component_templates.library_content: See where your candidates come from with a breakdown per origin.

component_templates.name: Top candidate sources
component_templates.library_content: See the most successful sources that give you the most candidates.

component_templates.name: Candidates per job
component_templates.library_content: An overview of all qualified candidates in each job’s pipeline.

component_templates.name: Candidates over time
component_templates.library_content: Discover where most of your candidates come from (careers site, manually added, etc.).

component_templates.name: Moved candidates
component_templates.library_content: Number of candidates who have moved forward in the pipeline.

component_templates.name: Interviewed
component_templates.library_content: Candidates who have reached the interview stage type.

component_templates.name: Received a job offer
component_templates.library_content: Candidates who have reached the stage type: Offer.

component_templates.name: Overdue candidates
component_templates.library_content: Candidates who have stayed in stage beyond the time limit.

component_templates.name: Pipeline activity per stage type
component_templates.library_content: See how many candidates moved to specific stage type over time.

component_templates.name: Proceed rates per stage type
component_templates.library_content: Stay informed about the volume of candidates in your pipelines to recruit diverse talent.

component_templates.name: Drop-off rates per stage type
component_templates.library_content: Make sure you spend time moving only the right candidates through your pipelines.

component_templates.name: Time spent per stage type
component_templates.library_content: Reduce the amount of time candidates spend in each of your stages to improve candidate experience and hire top talent before anyone else.

component_templates.name: Time to reach per stage type
component_templates.library_content: Find recruitment bottlenecks and optimize them to improve your candidates’ experiences and save your team time.

component_templates.name: Total disqualifications
component_templates.library_content: Number of disqualified candidates.

component_templates.name: Disqualified automatically
component_templates.library_content: Number of disqualifications through knockout questions.

component_templates.name: Top disqualify reasons
component_templates.library_content: See the breakdown of disqualifications by reason.

component_templates.name: Disqualifications in stages
component_templates.library_content: See when exactly candidates get disqualified in the pipeline.

component_templates.name: Disqualifications by source
component_templates.library_content: See where most disqualified candidates came from.

component_templates.name: Disqualifications over time
component_templates.library_content: Number of disqualified candidates over time.

component_templates.name: Time to disqualify
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes to disqualify a candidate.

component_templates.name: Time to disqualify per job
component_templates.library_content: See how long it takes to disqualify a candidate in a certain job pipeline.

component_templates.name: Total hires
component_templates.library_content: Number of hired candidates.

component_templates.name: Hires per source
component_templates.library_content: See where hires came from.

component_templates.name: Hires per job
component_templates.library_content: Number of hires in each job.

component_templates.name: Number of hires per recruiter
component_templates.library_content: See the number of hired candidates with a breakdown by recruiter.

component_templates.name: Hires over time
component_templates.library_content: Number of hires made over time.

component_templates.name: Time to hire
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes to hire a new candidate.

component_templates.name: Time to hire per recruiter
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes a recruiter to hire a candidate.

component_templates.name: Time to hire by hiring manager
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes a hiring manager to hire a candidate.

component_templates.name: Time to start
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes from the hire date until the time the candidate starts work.

component_templates.name: Time to start by job
component_templates.library_content: The time it takes from the hire date until the time the candidate starts work.

component_templates.name: Completed interviews
component_templates.library_content: Number of conducted interviews.

component_templates.name: Events by type
component_templates.library_content: See what kind of interviews are booked most often.

component_templates.name: Events by team member
component_templates.library_content: See who takes part in events most frequently.

component_templates.name: Events by duration
component_templates.library_content: Compare the number of interviews grouped by duration.

component_templates.name: Interviews over time
component_templates.library_content: Number of completed interviews over time.

component_templates.name: Interviewed candidates
component_templates.library_content: Number of candidates who have been interviewed.

component_templates.name: Interviewed candidates per interviewer
component_templates.library_content: Number of interviewed candidates by team members.

component_templates.name: Time spent interviewing
component_templates.library_content: Total time spent on completed interviews.

component_templates.name: Time spent interviewing by interviewer
component_templates.library_content: Total time spent on interviews by each team member.

component_templates.name: Completed evaluations
component_templates.library_content: Number of completed evaluations.

component_templates.name: Evaluation rating overview by team member
component_templates.library_content: See how each of your team members evaluates candidates.

component_templates.name: Evaluations over time
component_templates.library_content: Number of added evaluations over time.

component_templates.name: Evaluated candidates
component_templates.library_content: Number of candidates who have been evaluated.

component_templates.name: Average candidate score
component_templates.library_content: Average candidate score based on all evaluation ratings.

component_templates.name: Candidate score per source
component_templates.library_content: Compare scores across different sources and see where your best candidates come from.

component_templates.name: Requested evaluations by current status
component_templates.library_content: Overview of requested evaluations by status.

component_templates.name: Time to evaluate
component_templates.library_content: Average time it takes to complete a requested evaluation.

component_templates.name: Time to evaluate per team member
component_templates.library_content: Time it takes to complete a requested evaluation for each team member.

component_templates.name: Candidates by gender
component_templates.library_content: Number of candidates by gender.

component_templates.name: Candidates by nationality
component_templates.library_content: Distribution of candidates by nationality.

component_templates.name: Age of candidates
component_templates.library_content: Candidates segmented by age group.

component_templates.name: Hires in jobs by gender
component_templates.library_content: Hires per job, by gender.

component_templates.name: Disqualification reasons by gender
component_templates.library_content: Disqualification reasons by gender.

component_templates.name: Total visits
component_templates.library_content: Check the number of visits, excluding unique visits. It means that if a user visits your page, leaves it and then returns after more than 30 minutes, it will be counted as 2 visits, not as 1 unique visit.

component_templates.name: Visits per source
component_templates.library_content: See the number of visitors that reach your website and the channel they come from. For example, Indeed, LinkedIn, or Google for Jobs, organic traffic or direct access.

component_templates.name: Most visited jobs
component_templates.library_content: See which jobs are most popular among your site visitors and decide which jobs need more promotion.

component_templates.name: Most visited pages
component_templates.library_content: See which pages are most popular among your site visitors.

component_templates.name: Visits over time
component_templates.library_content: See the number of visits to your website over a specific period of time.

component_templates.name: Average visit duration
component_templates.library_content: Check how long visitors stay on your page during one visit. This helps you determine how well your content holds their attention.

component_templates.name: Careers page bounce rate
component_templates.library_content: Check the percentage of visits during which visitors exit without interacting with the site at all.

component_templates.name: Total applications
component_templates.library_content: See the number of completed applications over a period of time. Thanks to that, you'll know which job postings attract candidates.

component_templates.name: Applications per source
component_templates.library_content: See which channels are the most popular among applicants and give you the highest number of candidates. This will give you a better understanding of where to post your jobs in the future.

component_templates.name: Applications per job
component_templates.library_content: See which jobs get the largest number of applicants. Thanks to that, you can draw conclusions which jobs attract candidates.

component_templates.name: Applications over time
component_templates.library_content: Check the number of applications and see how the volume of application changes over time.

component_templates.name: Applicant conversion rate
component_templates.library_content: See how many of your visits end up in a finished application.

component_templates.name: Application conversion per job
component_templates.library_content: See how many percent of your site visitors convert into job applicants.

component_templates.name: Application form drop-off rate
component_templates.library_content: See how many applicants abandon job applications. If they leave the form without finishing it, you can check if it's not overly complex, too long, or have required questions which are hard to answer.

component_templates.name: Application form drop-off rate per job
component_templates.library_content: See how many site visitors leave the job application without finishing it – with a breakdown per job. If you use different form templates for one job, this might give you an idea of what works and what doesn't.

component_templates.name: Applications over time per campaign
component_templates.library_content: Number of applications generated by each paid campaign over time.

component_templates.name: Applications per channel
component_templates.library_content: See which channels are the most popular among applicants and give you the highest number of candidates.

component_templates.name: Hires per campaign
component_templates.library_content: Number of hires from paid campaigns.

component_templates.name: Visits over time per campaign
component_templates.library_content: See the number of visits to your careers site generated by each paid campaign over time.
